headline: Does ADI’s CEO Stock Sale Contrast With Analysts’ Brighter View of Its Earnings Power?
summary: In late March 2026, Analog Devices’ chair and CEO Vincent Roche sold about US$3.18 million of company stock under a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan, while the company continued highlighting its technology at industry events such as the International Conference on Display Technology in Chongqing, China. At the same time, multiple research houses became more positive on Analog Devices following an earnings beat, citing strong contributions from automated test equipment, data center optical...

headline: Assessing Analog Devices (ADI) Valuation As Analyst Optimism Builds Around Earnings Outlook
summary: Why Analog Devices stock is back in focus Recent research coverage on Analog Devices (ADI) has highlighted strong analyst optimism around upcoming earnings, with expectations for growth in both earnings per share and revenue, putting the stock firmly back on many investors’ watchlists. See our latest analysis for Analog Devices. headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Analog Devices (ADI) After A 94% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Analog Devices at around US$327 per share still offers value after a strong run, or if you may be late to the party, this article focuses squarely on what the current price may imply. The stock has returned 8.0% over the last 7 days, 3.7% over the past month, 19.6% year to date, and 94.0% over the past year, so the recent share price path is an important piece of the valuation puzzle. Alongside this share price performance, investors have been reacting to ongoing...

headline: Arete Upgrades Analog Devices (ADI) to Buy
summary: Analog Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) is one of the 10 best AI chip stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 30, Arete upgraded Analog Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) rating from Neutral to Buy. The firm forecasted a target price of $389, which results in a potential upside of more than 22% at the current level. […]
